name: Summer Fest Carousel
aesthetic: Retro graphic festival poster — flat color-block grid tiles, chunky italic slab-serif title with offset shadow, stylized vector illustrations (sun, surfer, lifesaver, drink, umbrella, popsicle, sunglass portrait). Navy + cream + red + yellow. Vintage summer energy.
reference: User-supplied 'Summer Fest' poster screenshot (Olivebridge NY). Translated to 5 carousel slides.

fonts.display_slab: Alfa Slab One (chunky italic display — SUMMER FEST title)

slides.subject: Cream bg. Top presenter bar 'BITEMAP PRESENTS'. 2x2 color-block tile grid at top half with SVG motifs: sun+beach, drink glass, surfer/lifesaver. Giant italic 'Summer / Fest' with yellow offset shadow center. Umbrella SVG bottom-right.

Light gray bg with two overlapping rotated tickets (top -5°, bottom +3°). Blue-grid top/bottom strips on top ticket, cream-grid on bottom. Each ticket: white body with 'SUMMER / TIME FESTIVAL' (Archivo Black with yellow FESTIVAL tag), date block top-right, bottom strip with 'YOUR PLACE' + address + black price pill ($50 VIP / $10 REG with red oval badge), perforated yellow stub right with vertical 'TABLE 01/05' + barcode box.
Split color-block panels (cream/red/yellow). Label 'ON THE MENU' or 'THE LINEUP'. 3-4 numbered items with alternating colored circle bullets. Sun SVG top-right.
Full-bleed illustrated beach/rooftop scene (sun, umbrella, palm silhouettes, ocean band). Yellow address banner bottom. Neighbourhood pill.
Navy bg with cream tile accent, BiteMap logo in cream oval, badges. Retro-fit version of the standard closer.
slides.copy: Fixed: 'find it on' / BiteMap logo / tagline / app badges

slide2.featureName: headliner name — can be restaurant, chef, artist

slide3.label: section label (UPPERCASE) e.g. 'ON THE MENU'
slide3.items: 3-4 short strings (dish names OR artist names OR stops)

copy_rules: Title is always 'Summer Fest' on slide 1 — do not substitute
Labels (BITEMAP PRESENTS / ON THE MENU / START FROM) are UPPERCASE wide-tracked
Item names on slide 3: 3-4 max, each 1-3 words
Restaurant name lives in @handle and feature-row only, never in the big title
Keep numbers and dates chunky — they are part of the visual
asset_rules: No photos required — all motifs are inline SVG
Illustrations are flat vector in the 4-colour palette; do NOT introduce extra colours
use_when: Summer food festival / night market coverage
Patio launch with event framing (DJ night, supper club, pop-up)
Multi-restaurant summer crawl or lineup post
